message:
🌱 Add backstage: [Plugin] Nomad mission (#909)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-691-plugin-nomad",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: [Plugin] Nomad",
+    "description": "A Nomad plugin for Backstage that provides full lifecycle management of HashiCorp Nomad tasks, including job versions and allocation tracking directly from the Backstage service catalog. Requested by 43+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Backstage installation is running:\n```bash\n# If running via Docker:\ndocker ps | grep backstage\n\n# If deployed on Kubernetes:\nkubectl get pods -n backstage\n```\nThis plugin requires a running Backstage instance and a Nomad cluster accessible from the Backstage backend."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install the Nomad plugin",
+        "description": "Add the Nomad plugin to your Backstage app from [PR #18010](https://github.com/backstage/backstage/pull/18010):\n```bash\ncd packages/app\nyarn add @backstage-community/plugin-nomad\n```\nThe plugin provides two main components: a Job Versions card and an Allocations table."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure the Nomad connection",
+        "description": "Add the Nomad configuration to your `app-config.yaml`:\n```yaml\nnomad:\n  addr: 'http://localhost:4646'\n```\nThen annotate your catalog entities to link them to Nomad jobs:\n```yaml\napiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Component\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    nomad.io/namespace: default\n    nomad.io/job-id: redis\n    nomad.io/group: 'redis|prometheus-collector'\n```\nThe `nomad.io/job-id` annotation is required. The `nomad.io/group` annotation is optional and filters allocations to specific task groups."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the Nomad plugin works",
+        "description": "Open Backstage and navigate to a service entity that has Nomad annotations:\n1. Check that the Nomad tab appears on the entity page\n2. Verify that job versions are displayed correctly\n3. Confirm that allocations for the linked Nomad job/group are listed"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A community-contributed Nomad plugin for Backstage provides job version tracking and allocation management directly from the service catalog. Configure the Nomad server address in app-config.yaml and annotate catalog entities with nomad.io/job-id to link them to Nomad jobs.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "nomad:\n  addr: 'http://localhost:4646'",
+        "apiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Component\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    nomad.io/namespace: default\n    nomad.io/job-id: redis\n    nomad.io/group: 'redis|prometheus-collector'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "backstage",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "backstage"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/691",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/pull/18010"
+    },
+    "reactions": 43,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Backstage instance (via Docker, npx @backstage/create-app, or Kubernetes) and a HashiCorp Nomad cluster."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:20:55.115Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
